scripts.dev:app: concurrently -k -n api,player,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:api" "wait-on -t 120s -l http-get://127.0.0.1:9090/health && npm run dev:player" "wait-on -t 120s -l http-get://127.0.0.1:9090/health && npm run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:ui: concurrently -k -n player,admin -c green,magenta "npm run dev -w @repo/player-ui" "npm run dev -w @repo/admin-console"
scripts.dev:ui:staging: concurrently -k -n player,admin -c green,magenta "npm run dev:staging -w @repo/player-ui" "npm run dev:staging -w @repo/admin-console"
scripts.dev:casino: concurrently -k -n api,player -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "wait-on -t 120s -l http-get://127.0.0.1:9090/health && npm run dev:player"
scripts.dev:with-worker: concurrently -k -n api,player,worker -c blue,green,cyan "npm run dev:api" "wait-on -t 120s -l http-get://127.0.0.1:9090/health && npm run dev:player" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.dev:casino:stack: node scripts/ensure-core-env.mjs && docker compose up -d postgres redis && node scripts/wait-tcp.mjs 127.0.0.1 5432 120000 && npm run dev:casino
scripts.restart:dev: node scripts/ensure-core-env.mjs && npm run compose:down && npm run compose:up && node scripts/wait-tcp.mjs 127.0.0.1 5432 120000 && npm run migrate:core && npm run dev:app
scripts.demo:player-journey: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "npm run demo:vip-journey; npm run demo:rewards"
